description_long: This is a low-top casual sneaker with a smooth, light blue upper and a contrasting brown sole. The shoe features white laces threaded through four pairs of gold eyelets, adding a touch of detail to the otherwise minimalist design. The upper appears to be made of a synthetic or canvas-like material, while the sole is likely rubber, providing durability and grip. The interior is visible and seems to be lined with a softer material for comfort. The overall silhouette is streamlined, with a rounded toe and a slightly raised heel. There are no visible logos or brand markings, and the shoe appears to be in pristine, unused condition.
description: A light blue low-top sneaker with white laces, gold eyelets, and a brown rubber sole, featuring a clean and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth blue upper, white laces, gold eyelets, and the full length of the brown sole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel shape, the back seam, and the interior lining of the shoe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the blue upper, laces, and brown sole from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded toe, lacing system, and the width of the sole at the front.
